Document:
# Troupes And Masks Masks are the driving force of every shift. They are the catalysts for chaos, conflict and mystery in Ephemeral Space.
Masks are categorized into [bold]Troupes[/bold]: collections of masks with the same overarching goals. Each troupe has a set of shared objective(s), and a win condition which will end the round with that troupe's victory.
At roundstart, a random [textlink="masquerade" link="Masquerades"] is chosen, which determines which masks will be given out to players at specific population levels. Each masquerade has a collection of troupes which will be in the round, as well as defined mask sets for each additional player at each population level. This allows for more control, and for specific masquerades to be more highly themed and interesting.
Latejoiners to a round will receive the [textlink="Crewmember" link="Crewmember"] mask, which has no special qualities. It is highly recommended that you play from the beginning of a round to the end if you want to play a round, since latejoining inherently messes with the social narrative of the round.
## Troupes - [textlink="Crew" link="Crew"] who must keep the station running and escape the radiation storm - [textlink="Traitors" link="Traitors"] amongst the crew who must assassinate, sabotage, and deceive, ending with an attempt to nuke the station.
